title: eulophia ovalis subsp. bainesii
intro: Eulophia ovalis subsp. bainesii, also known as Baines' eulophia, is a species of orchid that is native to tropical Africa. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antibacterial and anti-inflammatory activities, which are used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Eulophia ovalis subsp. bainesii include its use in treating fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal remedy by infusing the roots or leaves in water or boiling them to create a decoction, which can be used to treat various ailments.
